title: Chitin Equipment
description: Chitin shell now dropped from spiders, which you can use to make swords, tools, and armor.
body:
## **What is this mod?**
Both spiders and cave spiders now have a 50% chance of dropping a chitin shell, which you can use to make swords, tools, and armor. Their stats are inbetween stone and iron while having durability closer to iron.

![ingame icons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea1105e6c1146926ea037b29e2741efce3a8e480.png)

This mod was originally made for an idea I had wanted to implement into my personal modpack with specific mod integration, but I also wanted to create and upload a general version for anyone to play and enjoy.

Special thanks to:
Hummel009 for his [Dirt Tools and Armor mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/dirt-tools-and-armor) and opensource code
